title: Ceva Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Ceva Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Ceva Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ceva Logistics India:
Ceva Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ceva Logistics India!
